title: Used Car Price Prediction
description: Regularized regression project predicting used car resale prices with EDA, feature engineering, linear regression, Ridge, and Lasso models.
insights: Analyzed 15,915 AutoScout24 listings across 23 original features.
Created 7 engineered features including km_per_year, power_to_weight, and engine_efficiency.
Compared Linear, Ridge, and Lasso models and found feature engineering drove most of the predictive lift.
